title: Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch 18X
description: Ideal for larger-scale WISP applications, the EdgeSwitch ® 18X is an affordable high-performance switch with SFP ports and a fanless design. Sixteen Gigabit RJ45 ports offer copper connectivity with PoE input on port 1 and PoE passthrough on port 16. Two SFP ports offer fiber connectivity. The browser-based configuration interface offers intuitive control. Management is also available through the Ubiquiti ® Network Management System ( UNMS â¢) (16) Gigabit LAN (2) SFP ports Supports PoE passthrough on port 16 (software-selectable) Powered by 24V passive PoE or external 24V AC/DC adapter Wall or rack-mountable (bracket included) Device Power adapter 24V / 1A 19" Rackmount ears
